'''sabaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coadjacence|coadjacence]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-b-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coadjacence|coadjacence]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sabaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæbæyæth|sæbæyæth]] || [[word:sæbæyæj|sæbæyæj]] || [[word:sæbæyæsh|sæbæyæsh]] || [[word:sæbæyæ|sæbæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sababayath|sababayath]] || [[word:sababayaj|sababayaj]] || [[word:sababayash|sababayash]] || [[word:sababaya|sababaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sabayath|sabayath]] || [[word:sabayaj|sabayaj]] || [[word:sabayash|sabayash]] || [[word:sabaya|sabaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sabafyath|sabafyath]] || [[word:sabafyaj|sabafyaj]] || [[word:sabafyash|sabafyash]] || [[word:sabafyaf|sabafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sabayatha|sabayatha]] || [[word:sabayaja|sabayaja]] || [[word:sabayasha|sabayasha]] || [[word:sabayaka|sabayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sabayath|sabayath]] || [[word:sabayaj|sabayaj]] || [[word:sabayash|sabayash]] || [[word:sabaya|sabaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sabayathal|sabayathal]] || [[word:sabayajal|sabayajal]] || [[word:sabayashal|sabayashal]] || [[word:sabayakal|sabayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sabayathatha|sabayathatha]] || [[word:sabayajaja|sabayajaja]] || [[word:sabayashasha|sabayashasha]] || [[word:sabayaka|sabayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sabayathan|sabayathan]] || [[word:sabayajan|sabayajan]] || [[word:sabayashan|sabayashan]] || [[word:sabayakan|sabayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sabayathaoro|sabayathaoro]] || [[word:sabayajaoro|sabayajaoro]] || [[word:sabayashaoro|sabayashaoro]] || [[word:sabayakaoro|sabayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
